title: LowFire
description: A vibrant, performance-friendly Minecraft texture pack designed to reduce fire animation visibility.
body:
### 🔥 Low Fire Texture Pack – Made by ThunderDeath

The **Low Fire Pack** is specially designed for PvP, Survival, and Hardcore players who want maximum screen clarity without losing the vanilla Minecraft feel. Normal Minecraft fire often covers your entire screen during battles, making it hard to see enemies, mobs, or even your surroundings. This pack solves that problem by **reducing the fire animation size** so you can focus on what really matters — winning fights and surviving longer.

#### 🌟 Features

* **Low Fire Animation** → Clearer visibility while fighting, mining, or exploring caves.
* **FPS Boost Friendly** → Lightweight design ensures smooth performance on low-end and high-end PCs alike.
* **Universal Compatibility** → Works across **all versions of Minecraft** (from old to the latest).
* **PvP Ready** → Gives you an edge in combat by keeping your screen distraction-free.
* **Clean Pack Logo** → A stylish orange/red fire logo that represents the theme of this pack.

#### 🎮 Why Use This Pack?

If you’ve ever struggled in PvP because of fire blocking your view, this pack is made for you. It’s especially useful on competitive servers, Hardcore worlds, or even casual play when you just want to see more and stress less. Unlike heavy packs, this one is lightweight, optimized, and doesn’t affect other textures, so you still get the **classic Minecraft vibe** with a pro-level advantage.

#### 🛠️ Installation

1. Download the **Low Fire Texture Pack – Made by ThunderDeath**.
2. Place the `.zip` file into your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Select it from the Resource Packs menu in-game.
4. Enjoy a cleaner, smoother PvP experience!
